title: JR Pictograms For MTR
description: JR Pictograms For The Minecraft Transit Railway Mod
body: A resource pack that adds Japan Rail Pictograms for the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod. These Pictograms can be put on railway signs from the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod.![JR, Shinkansen, Narita Express, Sakura Tram, And Tokyo Metro](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8dd2f58e2a4296a1812db6bb3a337deee1660d6a_0.webp)![Tokyo Metro Lines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce2cb7a0febcc0e746ad329a2a1173b34d5188b4_0.webp)![JR Lines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43d575adf68a18f7c2489f35bd8d647db73363b4_0.webp)![JR and Tokyo Metro Line logos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ea6683d47e3c8431bcc8cfaf55c7d42b5a2db9d_0.webp)
